title: autonoe berthelotii
intro: Autonoe berthelotii, also known as the "Tournesol" or "Mexican Marigold", is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Autonoe berthelotii has been valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's extracts have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever reduction, digestive problems, and skin infections, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Autonoe berthelotii is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements and topical creams, highlighting its potential benefits for overall health and well-being.
